title: Aditi Gandhi joins Novartis as Head Legal Gulf
description: Aditi Gandhi has joined Novartis as Head Legal in the Gulf region.Gandhi is an alumna of Mumbai University.She has over 8 years of experience, with over 5 of those years being in the MENA region. She specialises in Joint Ventures, Mergers & Acquisitions, Employment Agreements and Commercial Agreements, which includes drafting and negotiating various Commercial Agreements, including long-term supply and procurement contracts, licensing agreements, executive service contracts.Gandhi was associ
